name: retained state set
definition: finite or structured state space carrying transition custody

name: retained transition
definition: E:S->S gives next admissible retained state

name: custody factorization
definition: exists G:P->S such that E = G ∘ Π
gate: same projection always implies same next retained state

name: projected quotient factorization
definition: exists H:P->P such that Π ∘ E = H ∘ Π
gate: same projection always implies same next projection
